retry_instruction: Keep going to the next item.

feedback_text: Great effort. Let us listen and try again.
retry_instruction: Say the word slowly one more time.

feedback_text: You started well. Listen for the last sound.
retry_instruction: Try the word again and finish the last sound.
example_text: Say cap and listen for p.

feedback_text: Great effort. Let us listen to the first sound.
retry_instruction: Start the word with the first sound you hear.

feedback_text: Good try. The middle sound needs another listen.
retry_instruction: Stretch the word and say the middle sound.

feedback_text: You skipped a word. That is okay.
retry_instruction: Go back and read the word again.

feedback_text: You said a different word. Let us try the printed word.
retry_instruction: Look at each letter and read it again.

feedback_text: Great effort. One word was not read yet.
retry_instruction: Point to the word and say it clearly.

feedback_text: Take your time. Let us keep the sentence moving.
retry_instruction: Read the sentence again with a smooth voice.

feedback_text: I need to hear your clear reading voice.
retry_instruction: Move closer and say it again.
Wait for a quiet moment and try again.
example_text: Try again when the room is quiet.

retry_instruction: Listen once more and read clearly.
Tap continue for your next reading step.
